task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or search interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar or patient lookup interface shows 'Maria Santos', 'Santos, Maria', or DOB '1978-06-22' entered, or the search results display this patient.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the demographic record for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Master Demographic record or patient profile screen is open, clearly displaying the name 'Maria Santos' and DOB '1978-06-22'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent changed the patient status to Inactive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the edit demographic screen, the patient status dropdown or field is visibly changed from 'Active' (or 'AC') to 'Inactive' (or 'IN').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Update', 'Save', or similar, and a subsequent screen (like the updated Master Demographic record) shows the patient's current status is now 'Inactive' or 'IN'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oscar EMR web interface rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Oscar EMR GUI. There should be no terminal windows executing curl, mysql, or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the correct patient and did not just create a new dummy patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The record being modified must clearly belong to 'Maria Santos' with DOB '1978-06-22' (and demographic_no=10050 if visible), rather than a newly created record.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the status change.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to edit the HTML text of the status field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. DOB: 1978-06-22. Initial Status: 'AC' (Active). Target Status: 'IN' (Inactive). Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN 1117. The agent must locate this specific patient in the Oscar EMR web interface and update their demographic status to Inactive.
